evidence.snippet: ### **From field-proven BLDC motors to our patented eVector counter-rotation motors, we deliver a full range of EPUs that redefines performance**
CR EPUs are mission-ready propulsion systems—used in all platforms in UAVs for logistics, agriculture, defense, and inspection.

items.notes: BLDC motors (single-axis, dual-axis eVector, frameless kits) and matched propellers for UAV EPU systems

evidence.snippet: Motors,  propellers, ESCs—we delivery solutions—not challenges

#### Full ecosystem
Motors, matched propellers, ESCs— so you spend less time tuning, more time flying.

items.notes: ESCs are included as part of their full EPU ecosystem offering

evidence.snippet: A US corporation, CR Systems offers a full range of NDAA-compliant electric motors and propulsion systems.

headquarters.notes: Explicitly 'A US corporation'; parent company is Santa Cruz Technologies, Inc.; contact phone (650) area code indicates Silicon Valley/Bay Area, CA. No street address published.

evidence.snippet: CR EPUs are mission-ready propulsion systems—used in all platforms in UAVs for logistics, agriculture, defense, and inspection.
Whether you're building drones, automation systems, marine platforms, or energy solutions—our propulsion systems are fully integrated and proven in the field.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells motors and EPU components to UAV manufacturers across logistics, agriculture, defense, and inspection platforms. Does not manufacture complete drone platforms.

items.name: Single-axis motors
items.product_type: BLDC UAV propulsion motors (multiple SKUs: 2806 FPV, 3115 SL, 4006 SL, 4010 PRO, 4015 PRO, 4130 FW, 5215 SL, 6008 SL, 6010 PRO, 6012 PRO, 6015 PRO, 6020 PRO, etc.)

items.name: Dual-axis eVector motors
items.product_type: Counter-rotational BLDC motors (EV10, EV20, EV50 variants)

ndaa.notes: Explicitly claims 'NDAA-compliant' on homepage, company page, and single-axis product page. Designed and manufactured in the US.

tagline: Manufactures single-axis and dual-axis brushless motors for UAV propulsion, ranging from small-frame to heavy-lift platforms, plus frameless rotor/stator kits for direct-drive integration. NDAA-compliant. Patented eVector dual-axis design claims up to 50% more thrust in equivalent package. Field deployed across 1000+ platforms. Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed.
